name: aped-method
description: Scaffold the APED pipeline (Analyze, PRD, UX, Arch, Epics, Story, Dev, Review) into any Claude Code project
author: yabafre

scripts.smoke: node bin/aped-method.js --version && node bin/aped-method.js --help > /dev/null && node scripts/smoke-pack.js
scripts.check: node --check bin/aped-method.js && node --check src/*.js && node --check src/templates/*.js && node --check src/templates/hooks/*.js && node --check src/templates/scripts/*.js && node --check scripts/smoke-pack.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run smoke && npm test
